cards.title: Asthma & COPD
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Asthma: Trigger identification, anti-inflammatory diet, Buteyko breathing
  • COPD: Pulmonary rehab, NAC 600mg BD, magnesium
  • Peak flow monitoring & action plan
  • Naturopathic inhalers: Saline, eucalyptus, thyme

cards.title: Pranayama & Pulmonary Rehab
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Buteyko: Control pause (CP) measurement, nasal breathing training
  • Anulom-Vilom: 10 min for respiratory conditions
  • 6MWT (6-minute walk test): Baseline & response measurement
  • Respiratory muscle training: Threshold IMT

cards.title: COVID-19 & TB
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Long COVID: Fatigue, breathlessness, brain fog management
  • Post-COVID naturopathic protocol: Lactoperoxidase, CoQ10, D3
  • TB: Nutritional support, NAC, immunomodulation
  • Recurrent URTI prevention: Elderberry, Andrographis, Vitamin D
